Document
  └─ grid[3] props={card=true}
     ├─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
     │  ├─ heading[3] "Fast"
     │  └─ paragraph "content"
     ├─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
     │  ├─ heading[3] "Simple"
     │  └─ paragraph "content"
     └─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
        ├─ heading[3] "Flexible"
        └─ paragraph "content"
